meaning: n.<口>外出搜集情况的工作(如新闻采访,案件调查等)
examples: He assisted in unofficial ways with the routine legwork in various investigations.
The French Department is funding this, on the condition that we do all the legwork.
What I do is a kind of legwork.
The popularity of social networks like LinkedIn makes this kind of legwork easier than ever.
The cost can reach into the high six figures, mostly for the legal legwork.
